docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $26.00) SERVED SEP-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY HODGES, PATRICK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HODGES, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH $1,496.00 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,552.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,496.00 FILED BY HODGES, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT MIRENDA, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
